scripts.test:integration:services:up: docker compose --profile integration up -d --wait postgres-integration redis-integration
scripts.test:integration:services:down: docker compose --profile integration stop postgres-integration redis-integration
scripts.test:integration: DATABASE_URL=${INTEGRATION_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:55432/euphoria_integration} bunx drizzle-kit migrate && DATABASE_URL=${INTEGRATION_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:55432/euphoria_integration} CURSOR_SIGNING_SECRET=integration-cursor-signing-secret RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1 bun test test/integration
